faq.question: Can I convert transparent PNGs to JPG?
faq.answer: Yes. Transparent PNGs can be converted to JPG, though transparency is flattened into a solid background in the output.

faq.question: How does this improve image compatibility?
faq.answer: Converting PNG to JPG helps images work more broadly across websites, email clients, and apps that prefer JPG files.

faq.question: Will image quality be preserved?
faq.answer: Yes. The tool is designed to preserve image quality while making the file easier to share and use.

faq.question: Is the conversion fast and secure?
faq.answer: Yes. The online converter works quickly and securely for everyday image conversion needs.

faq.question: How do I get the converted image?
faq.answer: You will receive a downloadable JPG file right after the conversion is complete.
